channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-11
item.description:
Our open-source research community has seen exciting progress recently, with notable updates in the scienceverse/metacheck and JamieCummins/regcheck projects. In scienceverse/metacheck, Lakens improved the caching mechanism, ensured original data preservation, and optimized hardcoded folders, laying a solid foundation for future developments. Meanwhile, JamieCummins/regcheck introduced precheck functionality and removed dimension numbers for defaults, while also undergoing production preparation in multiple phases. These enhancements demonstrate the community's commitment to refining and expanding our research tools. The connections between these projects are evident, as improved data handling in scienceverse/metacheck can potentially inform and support the precheck functionality in JamieCummins/regcheck, highlighting the value of collaborative efforts across our community. Overall, these updates showcase the community's dedication to advancing open-source research and improving our shared tools.

23 commits across 2 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: statcheck

Most active:

regcheck18 commits
metacheck5 commits

item.title: statcheck: activity update
item.description:
MicheleNuijten/statcheck

The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch was worked on, where a merge was performed from the same branch of the `https://github.com/MicheleNuijten/statcheck` repository. This merge was done to integrate changes from the remote repository into the local `feature-non-apa-newer` branch. Additionally, on the `feature-non-apa-newer` branch, administrative updates were made, as indicated by the commit message "admin updates". The `feature-non-apa-newer` branch is the only branch mentioned in the commits, and all changes were made to this branch. The nature of the administrative updates is not specified beyond the commit message.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: regcheck: 8 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

Work was done on the "staging" branch, where precheck functionality was added. The dimension numbers for defaults were removed, as per the commit message. The RR flow was changed, and beta references were stripped from the code. Additionally, the repository underwent production preparation in three phases: phase 2 prod push, phase 3 prod prep, and phase 5 prod prep, with minor additions made preclin. The commit messages also mention a phase 2 prod push, indicating that the changes were pushed to production.

8 commit(s) today:

  • 4e45f4f [staging] add precheck functionality — Jamie Cummins
  • ad6c3aa [staging] remove dimension numbers for defaults — Jamie Cummins
  • c0b987d [staging] change RR flow — Jamie Cummins
  • ffa8ea4 [staging] strip beta references — Jamie Cummins
  • 2751f19 [staging] phase 5 prod prep — Jamie Cummins
  • 5092647 [staging] minor additions preclin — Jamie Cummins
  • 820b166 [staging] phase 3 prod prep — Jamie Cummins
  • 575f010 [staging] commit phase 2 prod push — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →
